title: Post-PCI follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports PCI context and clinician-led bleeding, thromboembolic, cardiovascular, and antithrombotic-risk review without mapping medicine names or doses into generated content.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped PCI identity and clinician-reviewed bleeding-risk context without medicine or dose generation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports PCI context and clinician-led bleeding, thromboembolic, cardiovascular, and antithrombotic-risk review without mapping medicine names or doses into generated content.

red_flags.text: Supports a clear post-MI management plan, blood-pressure and renal monitoring, and bleeding-risk assessment at follow-up.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped post-MI management-plan, blood-pressure, renal-monitoring, and arranged-follow-up documentation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports a clear post-MI management plan, blood-pressure and renal monitoring, and bleeding-risk assessment at follow-up.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.4.1–1.4.3 and 1.4.10 — secondary prevention and follow-up monitoring

investigations.text: Supports review of investigation results and future management from discharge documentation, exercise and functional context, cardiac rehabilitation, and structured follow-up.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped exercise-tolerance, cardiac-rehabilitation, and follow-up documentation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports review of investigation results and future management from discharge documentation, exercise and functional context, cardiac rehabilitation, and structured follow-up.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.7.1–1.8.34 — discharge information and cardiac rehabilitation

investigations.text: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-reviewed lipid-profile fields in adult cardiovascular prevention.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.4.1–1.5.7 — lipid assessment and baseline tests

investigations.text: Supports clinician-documented adherence, adverse-effect review, lifestyle and cardiovascular risk discussion, repeat lipid and liver testing, annual medication review, and agreed follow-up without mapping doses.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-led lipid medication review without medicine selection or dose mapping.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented adherence, adverse-effect review, lifestyle and cardiovascular risk discussion, repeat lipid and liver testing, annual medication review, and agreed follow-up without mapping doses.

source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.11.12 — treatment response and annual review

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented lifestyle discussion after myocardial infarction without autonomously generating diet, activity, smoking, or weight advice.

source_limitations: The source is specific to acute-coronary-syndrome and post-myocardial-infarction PCI rather than all PCI.
The catheter-review alias, symptom assertions or negatives, access-site and broad examination fields, ECG, CBC, prior angiogram, generic plans, adherence, and generic referral remain unsupported.
Medication selection, treatment duration, doses, and clinical interpretation remain clinician-stated; qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
